allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -u root tutor_local-lms-1 chown -R app:app /openedx/themes/amp-theme)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -u root tutor_local-lms-1 chown app:app /openedx/themes/amp-theme/lms/static/sass/partials/lms/theme/_extras.scss)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec tutor_local-lms-1 bash -c "grep -n 'amp-course-card\\|listing-courses.*grid\\|amp-dashboard' /openedx/staticfiles/amp-theme/css/lms-main-v1.css | head -20")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec tutor_local-lms-1 bash -c "grep -o 'amp-course-card[^{]*{' /openedx/staticfiles/amp-theme/css/lms-main-v1.css | head -10")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; tutor config printvalue LMS_HOST; tutor config printvalue ENABLE_HTTPS 2>&1)
